reviews.title: Not what I expected from a Waldorf Astoria
reviews.text: Constant issues with the room, missing toiletries and towels.  Dirty bathrooms in the pool area.  The staff was not helpful at all and even escalation to the general manager was completely dismissed.   Not worth your money. Find another hotel.  There are plenty in the area.

reviews.title: Dont do it go sheraton or W
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives:
Slow wifi
Thin walls
Uneven blackour curtains 
strange a/c unit
Sounds/ music with apology
Dated appareance
Old buttons
Unfriendly manager who you seem more like a nusiance to you than here to help
Entire row buttons jn elevator doesnt work
Gym small ans smells like cigarettes

reviews.title: A jem in Panama City hotel panorama
reviews.text: Waldorf Astoria Panama is a real jem! Very high level service, unbelievable rooms, classy restaurants and a fantastic swimming pool and spa! The hotel is situated in the financial centre and it is located 30 minutes ride from the airport. Don't waste time taste Panama and stay at Waldorf Astoria a really new experience is waiting for you!
reviews.positives: friendly Staff, luxurious property, relaxing

reviews.title: The view of the ocean is gone :(
reviews.text: The room was very comfortable and spacious enough, but the view of the ocean was blocked by the new building across the street.  It has 5-star amenities, friendly staff, and a good reputation.  We didn't try the restaurants due to not-so-good reviews.  Breakfast and lunch were pricey, but delicious.
reviews.positives: Location, comfortable bed, staff

reviews.title: As advertised
reviews.text: We were only at the hotel for a few hours but the staff was very friendly and rooms clean and nice.

reviews.title: Excellent hotel
reviews.text: Excellent hotel- My number one priority when I travel and business is to have a quiet hotel where I get a great nights sleep in a comfortable bed. This Hotel  does all of that And the front desk staff is great. They remembered me from my last trip, already had a copy of my passport, and the check in was quick and easy

reviews.title: Friendly staff, old rooms, good location.
reviews.positives: Hotel has well-assorted breakfast offerings and good coffee. Staff is really friendly, speaks good English and are helpful. Decent gym with good equipment. Good and safe location. You can walk to different restaurants in the area.
reviews.negatives: The aging and noisy rooms detracted from the overall comfort of the stay; very thin walls and you could hear phone conversations of your neighbours. The 6am wake up call (with someone knocking hard on a door) of your neighbour, wakes you up too. Bed was old as well and not comfortable. Really slow wifi.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: great hotel, big rooms and very nice pool area. However, there is no more real sea view

reviews.title: Bad smell, left early
reviews.positives: Weight room
reviews.negatives: There was a musty odor throughout the building

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Staff were very helpful, hotel was clean and the rooms were very good, really comfortable beds, would definitely stay again

reviews.title: great
reviews.text: clean, great location, walk 1 block to gauchos steak house… amazing steaks & staff

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: Book you will not be disappointed

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Not the Waldorf Astoria you would expect.
reviews.negatives: Limited options in the restaurant menu. Crowded pool. Ugly decoration

reviews.title: I loved it
reviews.text: The lobby is big and nice. Swimming pool beautiful, rooms are perfectly decorated to match the 5 star standards which WA has to offer.

reviews.title: disappointed
reviews.negatives: not as nice as I thought it would be. Not worth the money paid. TV didn’t work properly. There was no hot water. The curtains were dirty. The food from room service was a little too cold and dry.

reviews.title: Excelentes habitaciones
reviews.text: Excelente....para una próxima oportunidad me quedo en el WA
reviews.positives: Habitación - relación precio calidad - spa

reviews.title: Céntrico
reviews.text:
Bellísimo el lugar, habitación espaciosa, baño enorme, muy buen room service!! Excelente ubicación!!
No cuenta con parking, se debe pagar aparte.

reviews.title: Service incroyable
reviews.text:
Personnel attentif. Management au top.
Propreté et calme.
Emplacement central et proche de 5 mn de tous les points intéressants de la ville.

reviews.title: one of the best hotel in Panama
reviews.text: stuff, rooms, swimming pool, everything is fine

reviews.title: Nice hotel.  Good value.  Some things need to improve
reviews.positives: I’m the rooms.  We’re great.  Nice bathroom. Very clean
reviews.negatives: Views were not good, elevator broke down a bit, pool area not inviting and pool did not look clean.  We did not get in.  Also did not like that I was double charged for transportation and it was never fixed.  Breakfast was expensive for what the choices.  Ended up saying elsewhere

reviews.title: 7 out of 10 for a one night stay.
reviews.positives: They were very kind to bring me a small postre and card for my birthday.
reviews.negatives: The pool area didn’t seem clean, the sofas weren’t clean, no lights in the jacuzzi, and the bar closed too early.

reviews.title: Overall we had a good stay
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Smell of mold in the lobby and hallways

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Staff. Location. View from room

reviews.title: Nice romantic getaway, with room for improvement.
reviews.positives: I came for a quick weekend getaway with my partner to explore Casco Viejo and the city's vibe. The location for the hotel was great. Our room was nice, the bed and pillows were delicious, and room amenities were nice as well. The robes were very plush and comfy. We got a relaxing and hot stones couple's massage, which was perfect! Overall we enjoyed the few days we stayed there. The Staff working at the hotel was super friendly, and made our stay better.
reviews.negatives:
There were a few things that I consider were terrible, and would've never thought to have encountered in a Waldorf Astoria Hotel. First... the AC unit was the loudest i've ever heard. I am not exagerating. On several occasions throughout the night, it woke me up. The next big issue, is AC related as well... the vents are directly facing the bed, and that is very uncomfortable. 

The other issue was with privacy. Somehow the noise from the corridors was very audible from within the bedroom. Every time the staff rang our neighbors doorbell, we heard it in our room, which was annoying because apparently they were never there and they kept ringing repeatedly. 

I believe these are not complicated issues to address, but did not expect at this price range.

reviews.title: Nice stay
reviews.positives: I loved location, staff, and overall facilities.
reviews.negatives:
Steam room and locker area is tired. 
Gym is nice. 
Carpet in room seemed old.

reviews.title: A very comfortable place to stay
reviews.positives:
The buffet Breakfast is expensive ( $30) but was very good.
The room was luxurious and I slept very well.
The staff was very helpful, I got my room as soon as I checked in.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Excellent breakfast - phenomenal staff! Speedy room service and great location! Huighly recommend!

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: I appreciated the wonderful breakfast and the deck area as well as the service. The bed was plus and comfortable and second room we got was immaculate.
reviews.negatives: Upon arrival, I had ordered champagne and flowers for my anniversary. However, while the flowers were amazing, the room bar was not stocked, there was no champagne, and the room felt damp, as if the air was not working. They immediately changed the room, though I was just a little upset that the flowers were wasted on the room we didn't use.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Breakfast was delicious. Great variety and choices.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Fantastic building, and an excellent accommodating staff. The breakfast was incredible. Definitely recommend getting the breakfast included.
reviews.negatives: I think it was a bit expensive compared to other similar experiences in Panama City.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: I arrived well before my allowable check in time and the staff were able to get me in my room early.  Much appreciated!

reviews.title: We were really happy with it
reviews.positives: Breakfast was tasty and plentiful

reviews.title: Excellent stay
reviews.positives: Excellent hotel

reviews.title: One of a kind and I can’t waitto return.
reviews.positives: The staff was phenomenal very helpful and welcoming. The property was beautiful.

reviews.title: beautiful building great location would stay again it would love to have seen some type of activity for guest
reviews.positives: love the location

reviews.title: The Waldorf Astoria in Panama City, Panama was fantastic!
reviews.positives: One of the best aspects of our travel was the staff.  The team there are amazing.  The most notable team members are William (in the dining room/bar), Oliver (concierge service), and Lillie (concierge service).  We also appreciated the great breakfast, the beautiful views from the hotel, the walkability to great restaurants and stores, and the special touches like chocolate left from housekeeping, bottled water, robes, and slippers in the bathroom, door services and concierge services.

reviews.title: Relaxing and perfect accommodations!
reviews.positives: Perfect location, very central to the city and near fabulous restaurants. Yet, strategically placed on a one-way,  side street without any heavy traffic. We absolutely loved our stay here.  Their amazing staff will spoil and pamper you; especially Lille, the concierge.
reviews.negatives: Can’t think of any reason not to love this hotel.
